nasb.text: and they spoke to all the congregation of the sons of Israel, saying, “The land which we passed through to spy out is an exceedingly good land.

esv.text: and said to all the congregation of the people of Israel, “The land, which we passed through to spy it out, is an exceedingly good land.

cnv.text: 對以色列全體會眾說：“我們去窺探的那地，是十分美好的地方。

ccb.text: 对以色列全体会众说：“我们去打探的地方是佳美之地。
